title: Motivation theories
summary: 9609 AS motivation — Taylor, Mayo, Maslow, Herzberg, and McClelland.

simpleExplanation.title: Why people work hard
simpleExplanation.summary: Theories explain different drivers — money, social needs, self-actualisation, hygiene factors — helping managers design incentives.

sections.content: **Motivation theories** (2.2.3) are core **9609** content. Always **name the theorist** and **apply to the case**.
